# Copilot Instructions

## Project

Capstone project — idea TBD, currently in setup phase.

## Stack

- Runtime: Node.js 22 (LTS)
- Language: TBD (JS/TS)
- Package manager: npm

## Conventions

- Commit style: Conventional Commits (feat:, fix:, chore:, docs:)
- Branch naming: feature/<short-name>, fix/<short-name>
- Formatting: TBD (Prettier/ESLint once stack is chosen)

## Notes for Copilot

- Ask before adding new dependencies
- Keep functions small and documented
- This file will be updated once the project idea and stack are finalized

## Lessons from settings-form exercise

- Always specify validation rules explicitly (regex, min length) — vague prompts skip edge cases
- Always ask for accessibility (labels, ARIA) — it's not generated by default
- Always request tests be written AND run, not just written
